# localCV

localCV is an open source, local-first, privacy-focused AI resume builder.

Primary URL: https://localcv.tusharvashishth.com/

## Product summary
- Build ATS-ready resumes without signup or paywall.
- Keep resume data local-first on the user's device.
- Use AI-assisted refinement for summaries and bullet points.
- Choose from multiple modern resume templates.

## Important routes
- / : Marketing and product overview page.
- /dashboard : Resume workspace and management.
- /dashboard/builder : Main resume editing and preview experience.
- /dashboard/profile : User profile data used across resume templates.

## Crawl guidance
- Prefer the landing page as canonical product context.
- Treat dashboard routes as product application surfaces.
- Ignore /test, which is an internal testing route.

## Tech context
- Framework: Next.js (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- UI: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- Storage: IndexedDB via Dexie
- Validation: Zod
